title: Totemhelper
description: TotemHelper is a mod designed for players who want to maximize their efficiency when using Totems, especially in Crystal PvP.
body:
TotemHelper 2.0 is a mod designed for players who want to maximize their efficiency when using Totems, especially in Crystal PvP.

When you open your inventory, the mod automatically teleports your cursor to the nearest Totem, allowing you to equip it instantly without manually searching for the item. This significantly improves gameplay flow and enables immediate reaction in critical situations.

Features and benefits:

Automatically positions your cursor on the nearest Totem in your inventory.

Increases efficiency when quickly equipping Totems during combat.

Perfect for PvP modes where every second counts, such as Crystal PvP.

Fully compatible with Vanilla Minecraft, without affecting other game elements.

With TotemHelper 2.0, players gain:

Smoother and more comfortable gameplay during fights.

Faster reaction to threats.

Better utilization of Totems in high-pressure PvP scenarios.

TotemHelper 2.0 is a must-have for any PvP player looking for an edge in combat and never missing the moment when a Totem can save their life.
(this is not a cheat or autotot, you should not be banned from any server if the server does not ban this mod)
